name: linux-ricing
display_name: Linux Ricing — AI-Native Desktop Design System
description: Full-stack AI-driven Linux desktop ricing. The agent acts as designer — auditing the machine, exploring creative directions, generating HTML mockups, and implementing a fully personalized desktop end-to-end. Supports KDE Plasma and Hyprland (primary), with partial support for other WMs. Includes session state management with crash recovery, animated wallpaper pipeline (FAL + Seedance), and a Python ricer CLI.
author: Hasan (neos) + Hermes Agent

structure.SKILL.md: Main skill entry point — 9-step workflow (steps 1–8 + step 4.5 rollback checkpoint), §1-§16
structure.QUICKSTART.md: User-facing intro — 9-step session overview (incl. step 4.5), Seven Stances, animated wallpaper
structure.dev/DESIGN_PHILOSOPHY.md: Full design theory — 7 stances, game UI, usability, session state spec
structure.scripts/: Python tooling — ricer.py CLI, palette_extractor.py, session_manager.py, desktop_state_audit.py
structure.examples/: Sample design_system YAML files (e.g. dragonfable.yaml) for reference and testing — 10 built-in presets: catppuccin-mocha, nord, gruvbox-dark, dracula, tokyo-night, rose-pine, solarized-dark, doom-knight, void-dragon, shiva-temple
structure.references/: Internal architecture notes (e.g. color-extractor-architecture.md) — not end-user docs
structure.tests/: pytest suite — palette extractor, bug reproducers, capture
structure.workflow/: LangGraph StateGraph orchestration layer — maps the 8-step session to graph nodes with SQLite checkpointing for crash recovery (run.py entrypoint, graph.py, nodes/, validators.py, state.py)
structure.skills/: Nine focused sub-skills: hermes-ricer (legacy orchestrator — superseded by workflow/), hermes-cli-skin, hyprland-rice-from-scratch, ricer-apps, ricer-catalog-capture, ricer-gtk, ricer-kde, ricer-rollback, ricer-wallpaper

requirements.workflow_note: workflow/ deps are only needed when running the LangGraph orchestration layer directly (python workflow/run.py). The standard agent workflow via SKILL.md has no extra deps beyond pillow + jinja2.

optional.FAL_KEY: Required for animated wallpaper generation (FAL + Seedance pipeline)
optional.animated_engine: awww (swww v0.12+ rename — 'swww' package does not exist on Arch) or mpvpaper — required for animated wallpapers

install.instructions: Add this skill directory to skills.external_dirs in ~/.hermes/config.yaml, or copy to ~/.hermes/skills/creative/linux-ricing/. Then run: bash scripts/setup.sh
